channel.title: Diego Baptista Theuerkauf
channel.description: Recent content on Diego Baptista Theuerkauf

item.title: Network extraction by routing optimization
item.description:
Diego Baptista, Daniela Leite, Enrico Facca, Mario Putti & Caterina De Bacco

We introduce a method to extract network topologies from dynamical equations related to routing optimization under various parameters’ settings.

item.title: Principled network extraction from images
item.description:
Diego Baptista & Caterina De Bacco

We present a principled model to extract network topologies from images that is scalable and efficient.

item.title: Convergence Properties of Optimal Transport-Based Temporal Networks
item.description:
Diego Baptista & Caterina De Bacco

We study the behavior of various network properties on a number of network sequences evolving towards optimal design.
